This website can not detect your tokens on CEXs so checking eligibility for CEXs is not possible in this page

All You Need to Know About the Wise Monkey ($MONKY) Airdrop to Floki ($FLOKI) Holders

We’re thrilled to announce that Floki will support the launch of Wise Monkey ($MONKY), a memecoin inspired by the globally recognized “Three Wise Monkeys” proverb: See No Evil, Hear No Evil, Speak No Evil.
